item.text: {"id":"urn:kernel-v1:walk","label":"walk","synset":"urn:lexical-wn31:n-00285642","pattern":"InstanceSchema; body-part action + movement at a place","gloss":"An act in which someone advances from place to place by successive steps on the feet, using the body's own movement rather than being carried.","explication":{"schema":"kot-ast/1","frame":"InstanceSchema","referents":[{"index":1,"refKind":"SomethingRef"},{"index":2,"refKind":"SomeoneRef"},{"index":3,"refKind":"SomethingRef"}],"clauses":[{"type":"pred","pred":"HAPPEN","roles":{"undergoer":{"kind":"ref","index":1}}},{"type":"pred","pred":"DO","roles":{"agent":{"kind":"sp","head":{"kind":"primeHead","prime":"SOMEONE"},"bind":2},"instrument":{"kind":"sp","head":{"kind":"partFrame","of":{"kind":"sp","head":{"kind":"primeHead","prime":"BODY"}}}}}},{"type":"pred","pred":"MOVE","roles":{"undergoer":{"kind":"ref","index":2},"place":{"kind":"sp","det":"SOME","head":{"kind":"primeHead","prime":"WHERE~PLACE"},"bind":3}}}]},"references":[],"status":"draft","notes":"AST adequacy: lossy — the primes render an act involving body-part action and movement at a place, but cannot carry the criterial foot or leg use, successive stepping, or exclusion of being carried."}
